subcodes.first_line: O friends! The Kawthar of the utterance of the All-Merciful is manifest and flowing, and the sealed wine hath, by the power of the Name, the Self-Subsisting, been unsealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان کوثر بیان رحمن ظاهر و جاری و رحیق مختوم بقدرت اسم قیوم مفتوح و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Greatest Name, @praise and encouragement
